evidence_schema_version=1
status=OK
outcome=CARGO_SUCCEEDED_ARTIFACT_PRESENT
applicable=yes
artifact_present=yes
artifact_path=/work/cargo-target/debug/xai-grok-pager
sha256sum_command=sha256sum /work/cargo-target/debug/xai-grok-pager
sha256sum_output=aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa  /work/cargo-target/debug/xai-grok-pager
sha256sum_exit_code=0
stat_command=stat /work/cargo-target/debug/xai-grok-pager
stat_output=Size: 600647920 Blocks: 1173920 IO Block: 4096 regular file
stat_exit_code=0
file_command=file /work/cargo-target/debug/xai-grok-pager
file_output=ELF 64-bit LSB executable, x86-64, dynamically linked
file_exit_code=0
readelf_h_command=readelf -h /work/cargo-target/debug/xai-grok-pager
readelf_h_output=ELF Header: Class ELF64 Machine Advanced Micro Devices X86-64
readelf_h_exit_code=0
readelf_n_command=readelf -n /work/cargo-target/debug/xai-grok-pager
readelf_n_output=Displaying notes Build ID: abcdef0123456789
readelf_n_exit_code=0
readelf_d_command=readelf -d /work/cargo-target/debug/xai-grok-pager
readelf_d_output=Dynamic section at offset
readelf_d_exit_code=0
objdump_f_command=objdump -f /work/cargo-target/debug/xai-grok-pager
objdump_f_output=file format elf64-x86-64 architecture i386:x86-64
objdump_f_exit_code=0
inspection_complete=yes
failure_stage=NOT_APPLICABLE
reason=all required static inspection commands succeeded
